pattern_label: キャラクターのみ（Coco不参加）
pattern_description: キャラクターのみ（Coco不参加）
desc_ja: しらたま・しずく・ひよりの3匹だけで贈る、やさしい日常のひとこと。梅雨のじめっとした朝も、七夕の夜も、「おはよう」「大好き」「いつもありがとう」が水彩イラストで届く。大切な人へ、気持ちがすっと伝わる24種。
desc_en: Three animal friends — a cat, a turtle, and a bird — for the small words that matter most. 24 soft watercolor stamps to share everyday warmth, quiet gratitude, and gentle encouragement with the people you care about.

stamps.send_psychology: 気遣い・元気づけ
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat, bright morning eyes, one paw raised in cheerful wave, joyful smile), Shizuku (small turtle with flower on shell, peering upward with hopeful morning expression), and Hiyori (white bird with wings lightly spread, chirping cheerfully) gathered near a rain-streaked window with soft blue hydrangea blossoms pressing against the glass outside; muted early morning light through clouds. Full body group in lower 55% of frame, generous empty copy space at top 40%. Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection, bright hopeful expression. Handwritten-style Japanese text「おはよう」naturally placed at top center. Front view gentle group composition.

stamps.send_psychology: 温かさ・親密さ
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat, eyes blissfully half-closed in sleepy contentment, tiny adorable yawn with one paw raised in gentle goodnight wave, soft pillow tucked beside); warm lamp glow, lavender hydrangeas softly visible through rainy window behind. Bust-up in lower-left 55%, generous copy space at upper right. Sparkling warm sleepy eyes, soft light reflection. Handwritten-style Japanese text「おやすみ〜」naturally placed at upper right. Three-quarter angle, looking slightly downward sleepily.

stamps.send_psychology: 感謝・温かさ
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shizuku (small turtle with flower on shell, both front flippers pressed together in heartfelt gratitude, warm sincere eyes) and Hiyori (gentle white bird with wings gently folded to chest in a moved thankful gesture, soft appreciative expression); glass vase with blue hydrangeas in warm indoor light, gentle rain outside window. Side-by-side bust-up in lower 55%, generous text space at top. Sparkling warm eyes, genuine gratitude gaze. Handwritten-style Japanese text「いつもありがとう」naturally placed at top center. Eye-level angle, warm depth.

stamps.send_psychology: 愛情・距離を縮める
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat, gazing at Hiyori with pure warm sideways affection, tiny tender smile) and Hiyori (gentle white bird with feathers softly puffed in pleased warmth, happy expression meeting Shirotsuma's gaze); very close together, soft pink and lavender watercolor with tiny scattered petals, cozy lamp glow. Very close-up intimate composition in lower-right 55%, generous text space at upper left. Sparkling warm eyes, genuine tender affection. Handwritten-style Japanese text「大好き」naturally placed at upper left. Extremely close side-to-side intimate angle.

stamps.dialogue: 今日も素敵ないちにちになりますように
stamps.send_psychology: 気遣い・祈り・温かい応援
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat, walking briskly with bright forward-looking morning energy), Shizuku (small turtle with earnest tiny steps, flower on shell glowing) and Hiyori (white bird flying lightly ahead, wings spread in gentle blessing) along a dewy garden path with soft blue hydrangea garden suggested in background; diffused morning light breaking through clouds. Full body group in lower 45%, generous text space at top 50%. Sparkling warm eyes, bright hopeful expression. Handwritten-style Japanese text「今日も素敵ないちにちになりますように」naturally placed at top. Side profile gentle walking composition.

stamps.send_psychology: 気遣い・確認・距離調整
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shizuku (small turtle with flower on shell, head gently tilted with caring inquisitive expression, warm curious eyes looking directly up at viewer, slight concerned warmth); cozy evening lamp glow, soft rain drops visible on window behind. Centered bust-up in lower 55%, generous text space at top. Sparkling warm eyes, gentle inquiring gaze. Handwritten-style Japanese text「元気？」naturally placed at top center. Slight looking-up-at-viewer angle, intimate frontal composition.

stamps.send_psychology: 期待・ワクワク・共感
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat, tail raised excitedly, paws together in joyful anticipation, bright eager eyes) and Shizuku (small turtle with wide happy eyes, flower on shell bright, pulling a tiny pastel mint umbrella ready for a rainy adventure); warm playful palette of mint and butter yellow, tiny rain drops suggested. Dynamic lively duo in lower-left 55%, generous copy space at upper right. Sparkling warm excited eyes. Handwritten-style Japanese text「楽しみ〜」naturally placed at upper right. Angled dynamic composition.

stamps.send_psychology: 背中を押す・励まし・共感
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat, looking determined with tiny fist raised, bright forward gaze), Shizuku (small turtle with focused earnest forward lean, tiny determined expression) and Hiyori (white bird with wings slightly spread in encouraging forward energy, bright eyes); fresh motivated morning atmosphere, small potted succulent nearby. Full body group in upper 55%, generous copy space at bottom 40%. Sparkling warm eyes, energetic hopeful gaze. Handwritten-style Japanese text「やってみよう」naturally placed at bottom. Three-quarter view from slightly below, empowering upward angle.

stamps.send_psychology: 共感・やさしい励まし
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Hiyori (gentle white bird with soft blue-tipped wing feathers, compassionate expression, one wing lightly raised in quiet reassurance, warm understanding eyes gazing gently forward); diffused soft rainy-day light, tiny lavender hydrangeas and gentle rain drops in background, sage and lavender palette. Centered in lower-middle 50%, generous vertical text space on both sides. Sparkling warm eyes with compassionate gaze, soft light reflection. Handwritten-style Japanese text「少しずつでいい」naturally placed vertically on both sides. Quiet intimate frontal composition.

stamps.send_psychology: 受容・気持ちを軽くする・ユーモア
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat, completely relaxed accepting expression with a tiny amused smile, one shoulder raised in a carefree shrug, paws loosely dangling in front, eyes with a gentle unbothered glow); cozy evening setting, soft warm lamp, muted rainy night outside window. Casual bust-up in lower-right 55%, generous copy space at upper left. Sparkling warm eyes with relaxed gentle amusement. Handwritten-style Japanese text「まぁいいんじゃない」naturally placed at upper left. Slightly looking upward casual relaxed angle.

stamps.send_psychology: 気遣い・見送り・温かさ
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shizuku (small turtle with caring eyes looking up, flower on shell bright, one flipper gently raised in warm farewell) and Hiyori (gentle white bird with wings slightly open in a caring send-off gesture, soft worried-but-warm expression) near a rain-streaked window with a small pastel mint umbrella leaning beside them; warm caring gentle light. Characters in lower 50%, generous text space at top. Sparkling warm caring eyes, soft light reflection. Handwritten-style Japanese text「気をつけてね」naturally placed at top center. Slightly looking-down warm farewell perspective.

stamps.send_psychology: 祝福・喜び・分かち合い
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat, clapping paws together joyfully with radiant smile, bright eyes sparkling) and Hiyori (gentle white bird dancing with wings fully spread in pure celebration, tiny joyful chirp); soft confetti-like hydrangea petals and tiny stars floating around them; festive delicate palette of mint, soft pink, ivory. Bust-up joyful composition in lower-left 55%, generous text at upper right. Sparkling warm eyes, genuine joy. Handwritten-style Japanese text「おめでとう」naturally placed at upper right. Upward-looking celebratory angle.

stamps.dialogue: ご連絡ありがとうございます
stamps.send_psychology: 丁寧な感謝・礼儀・距離を保ちつつ温かく
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shizuku (small turtle, sitting formally upright with dignified composed posture, respectful slight bow of head, shell flower neat and prominent, polite warm expression); clean minimal background, soft cool-warm professional morning light, tiny hint of blue hydrangea in corner. Centered formal bust-up in lower 55%, generous text space at top. Sparkling warm eyes with polite professional expression. Handwritten-style Japanese text「ご連絡ありがとうございます」naturally placed at top center. Symmetrical front view, dignified but warm composition.

stamps.dialogue: よろしくお願いいたします
stamps.send_psychology: 丁寧さ・信頼構築・スタート感
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shirotsuma (white cat with small respectful bow, earnest expression), Shizuku (turtle with dignified head bow, shell flower neat) and Hiyori (white bird with graceful bow, wings neatly folded) in a warm formal lineup; clean professional morning light, soft clean background. Full formal lineup in lower 45%, generous text space above. Sparkling warm eyes with polite sincere expression. Handwritten-style Japanese text「よろしくお願いいたします」naturally placed at top center. Slight looking-up angle, respectful warm composition.

stamps.send_psychology: 喜び表現・感謝・距離を縮める
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat, eyes wide with genuine delight, tiny paws pressed together in pure joy, vibrating with happiness) and Hiyori (gentle white bird with wings slightly spread in happy surprise, genuine warm emotion, feathers puffed with joy); soft warm golden light, tiny hydrangea petals floating gently. Close-up duo in lower-right 55%, generous text space at upper left. Sparkling warm eyes, bright hopeful expression, genuine emotion. Handwritten-style Japanese text「嬉しいです」naturally placed at upper left. Close-up slightly upward-looking angle.

stamps.send_psychology: 丁寧な期待・おもてなし感
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shizuku (small turtle with flower on shell, seated with calm welcoming expression, looking forward with gentle anticipation) and Hiyori (white bird perched on table edge nearby, wings neatly folded, looking forward with quiet readiness); two small white porcelain teacups on the table, warm afternoon light through linen curtains, soft rain outside. Three-quarter composition in left 55%, generous text space at right. Sparkling warm eyes with gentle anticipation. Handwritten-style Japanese text「お待ちしております」naturally placed at right side. Elegant side angle composition.

stamps.dialogue: 思い出してくださり、嬉しいです
stamps.send_psychology: 感動・じんわりとした喜び
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat, genuinely moved expression, eyes glistening warmly with tiny shimmer of emotion, paw softly pressed to chest in overwhelmed gratitude); soft diffused rainy-day indoor light, muted warm watercolor with soft blurred hydrangea tones background. Centered bust-up in lower 55%, generous text space at top. Sparkling warm eyes with genuine touched emotion, soft light reflection. Handwritten-style Japanese text「思い出してくださり、嬉しいです」naturally placed at top. Eye-level intimate angle, emotional warmth.

stamps.send_psychology: 認める・励ます・温かい観察
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shizuku (small turtle with flower on shell, looking toward Hiyori with gentle proud encouraging expression, warm observant eyes slightly elevated) and Hiyori (white bird sitting tall with growing confidence, bright eyes, tiny chest puffed with pride); warm evening lamp light, small hydrangea in glass jar nearby. Bust-up composition in upper 55%, generous copy space at bottom. Sparkling warm eyes, gentle proud encouraging gaze. Handwritten-style Japanese text「一歩成長だね」naturally placed at bottom center. Shizuku slightly higher looking warmly at Hiyori, gentle intimate angle.

stamps.send_psychology: 愛情・観察・距離を縮める
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat, warm sideways gaze at Shizuku with pure affectionate expression, tiny knowing smile) and Shizuku (small turtle with flower on shell, looking slightly upward with a pleased shy expression, flower glowing warmly); very close together, soft rose and sage watercolor atmosphere with tiny scattered petals, gentle afternoon light. Close-up intimate composition in lower-right 55%, text space at upper left. Sparkling warm eyes with genuine tender affection. Handwritten-style Japanese text「そういうところ好き」naturally placed at upper left. Close side-to-side intimate angle.

stamps.dialogue: 笑顔溢れるいちにちになりますように
stamps.send_psychology: 祝福・優しい応援
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat, eyes bright with warm morning energy, open gentle arms in a soft welcoming gesture), Shizuku (small turtle with flower on shell, looking upward hopefully with earnest morning smile) and Hiyori (white bird with wings softly spread upward as if blessing the day, gentle radiant gaze); soft morning garden with blue hydrangeas, morning light breaking through clouds. Full body group in lower center, generous vertical text space on both sides. Sparkling warm eyes, bright hopeful expression. Handwritten-style Japanese text「笑顔溢れるいちにちになりますように」naturally placed vertically on both sides. Front view blessing group composition.

stamps.dialogue: やってみて修正したらいい
stamps.send_psychology: 前向きな許可・実践的励まし
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shizuku (small turtle with flower on shell, calm practical expression radiating quiet confidence, looking at a tiny open notebook with a small pencil, thoughtful forward lean); quiet workspace afternoon light, small green plant nearby, subtle rain outside. Bust-up in lower-left 55%, generous text space at right. Sparkling warm eyes with practical wisdom and warmth. Handwritten-style Japanese text「やってみて修正したらいい」naturally placed at right side. Slightly overhead productive working angle.

stamps.send_psychology: 丁寧な挨拶・礼儀・信頼構築
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat, gentle formal morning bow, earnest expression), Shizuku (small turtle with upright dignified posture, shell flower bright, formal morning bow) and Hiyori (white bird with graceful morning bow, wings neatly folded, warm polite eyes); fresh morning light, soft blue hydrangeas outside window. Bust-up formal trio in lower 55%, generous text space at top. Sparkling warm eyes with polite morning warmth. Handwritten-style Japanese text「おはようございます」naturally placed at top center. Slight upward respectful angle, warm polite composition.

stamps.send_psychology: 祝福・喜び・特別感
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat wearing a tiny flower crown of blue hydrangeas, both paws raised high in joyful birthday celebration), Shizuku (small turtle with a decorative hydrangea bloom placed on shell, bright joyful birthday expression, tiny party smile) and Hiyori (white bird with wings fully spread in maximum celebration, tiny confetti petals swirling around); small wrapped gift box with ribbon and delicate floral petals floating, festive pastel palette. Full body celebration group in lower-left 55%, generous text at upper right. Sparkling warm excited eyes, bright joyful expression. Handwritten-style Japanese text「お誕生日おめでとう」naturally placed at upper right. Looking-up angle, full celebratory composition.

stamps.dialogue: 元気をいただきました
stamps.send_psychology: 感謝・エネルギーをもらった喜び
stamps.image_prompt: Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. 1:1 square format, transparent background PNG, no background, isolated characters. Hiyori (white bird with soft blue-tipped wing feathers, fully energized joyful expression, wings spread wide in grateful happy burst of energy, looking upward forward with bright gleaming eyes, tiny sparkles around wings suggesting received energy); warm gold and sage light breaking through rain clouds behind. Full body centered in lower 50%, generous text space at top. Sparkling warm eyes, bright hopeful expression, genuine gratitude and vibrant energy. Handwritten-style Japanese text「元気をいただきました」naturally placed at top center. Looking-up full-body energized composition.
